seoTitle: Point Souttar vs Point Turton — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Point Souttar and Point Turton. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogTitle: Point Souttar vs Point Turton: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Point Souttar and Point Turton.
heading: Point Souttar vs Point Turton — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Point Souttar, South Australia and Point Turton, South Australia. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Point Turton has a lower overall climate risk score (39/100) compared to Point Souttar (41/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Point Souttar or Point Turton safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Point Souttar has a flood risk score of 59/100, while Point Turton scores 29/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Point Souttar scores 35/100 for bushfire risk. Point Turton scores 54/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Point Souttar or Point Turton?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Point Turton has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.63% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
